description: This file contains styles for form checkboxes, radio buttons, switches, and related UI components in a Bootstrap-based project. It defines layout, appearance, and state-specific styles using Sass syntax, variables, mixins, and conditional logic.
external_files: bootstrap variables and mixins (implied by use of variables like $form-check-min-height, mixins like @include transition)

methods.name: transition
methods.description: Applies transition effects to elements, likely a Sass mixin.

methods.name: border-radius
methods.description: Applies border-radius styling, likely a Sass mixin.

methods.name: color-mode
methods.description: Applies color mode styles, such as dark mode, likely a Sass mixin.

methods.name: escape-svg
methods.description: Escapes SVG images for use in CSS backgrounds.

search-terms: scss variables and mixins for forms
